历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 2782 → 3004 → 2754 → 5945 → 5985. In 2024, there was a significant drop in ranking (from 2754 to 5945), and in 2025 it remained roughly stable at 5985. In the past two years, the ranking has stabilized around 6000, with a baseline ranking of about 5985 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 538 in 2021 → 501 in 2022 → 494 in 2023 → 494 in 2024 → 503 in 2025, showing a slight decrease followed by a recovery. In 2026 (§ 7), the Physics Category plan is 535, and the Medical Category plan is 121 (Medical Category also targets Physics Category students), totaling 656, an increase of about 30% compared to 503 in 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 15th (Top 20), with a consistently rising ranking in recent years (17th in 2021 → 16th in 2022 → 15th in 2023 → 13th in 2024 → 16th in 2025 → 15th in 2026), firmly among the top universities in the country. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, there were no significant negative signals in reputation evaluation for Southeast University. An incident involving teacher ethics in 2023 has passed its时效. On Douyin, the comprehensive popularity ranking is 31st (relatively hot), with short video exposure reflecting a mid-to-high level of application attention. No records of投档断档 were observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 5 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), and a total of 18 disciplines rated A- or above, covering core engineering fields such as information, electronics, computer science, control, machinery, electrical engineering, civil engineering, architecture, and transportation. The discipline strength is extremely prominent, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors at Southeast University, such as Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Computer Science (recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), continue to see rising social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu Province general college entrance examination is approximately 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to about 358,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates has increased from about 260,000 to about 380,000, intensifying competition. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and is the only 985 engineering powerhouse in the province, with a large enrollment scale in the province (Physics Category often exceeds 500 students). Local candidates have a strong willingness to apply, and regional preferences support the ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking around 6000 in 2024–2025, a significant enrollment expansion of about 30% in 2026 easing competition, but a simultaneous substantial increase of about 45.6% in provincial Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, the university's top-tier level and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, and the continued high popularity of core engineering majors, both supply and demand are expanding, but the growth rate of candidates exceeds the expansion rate. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 5985. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6577, with a range of 6077–7077.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6077–7077, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Wu Jianxiong Class, Future Robotics, Electronic Information, Computer Science) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6077), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>7077), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as backups. Southeast University has extremely strong engineering strength, and popular majors such as Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering are highly competitive. When filling out applications, you should consider personal interests and discipline evaluation grades comprehensively.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 950 → 867 → (no data for 2023) → 798 → 828, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend, with a baseline ranking of about 828 in 2025; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 25 in 2021 → 69 in 2022 → 12 in 2024 → 9 in 2025, with continuous reduction in recent years; the 2026 plan is 9, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 15th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top universities in the country; no significant negative signals in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation evaluation for Southeast University; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 31st (relatively popular), with above-average application attention; Law A- (fifth round), with some relevance to the economics and management majors in the Liberal Arts Experimental Class; Management Science and Engineering A-, supporting the Digital Economy and Intelligent Management direction.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting/Finance/Auditing (recommended), Finance/Economics (differentiated wait-and-see) and other economics and management majors have medium-to-high popularity; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025, with the estimated number of History Category candidates rising from about 97,000 to about 141,000, significantly intensifying competition; Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, as a provincial 985 university, and although the History Category enrollment plan is small, provincial candidates have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in History Category rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, but a significant increase of about 45.6% in provincial History Category candidates intensifying competition, the top-tier university level, and the medium-to-high popularity of economics and management majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move upward from the 2025 baseline of 828; predicted minimum ranking is about 808, with a range of 716–900.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Southeast University's medical category in Jiangsu Province from 2021 to 2025 are: 2021: 7126th (planned enrollment 163), 2022: 6556th (planned enrollment 167), 2023: 6253rd (planned enrollment 156), 2024: 5945th (planned enrollment 162), 2025: 6362nd (planned enrollment 145). Overall, there was a trend of year-on-year increase (harder to enter) from 2021 to 2024, with a significant correction in 2025. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is sharply reduced to 121 (a decrease of 24 from 2025, a reduction of about 16.6%). The significant enrollment reduction will increase competition for admission, and the ranking is expected to rise again.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected for the national Double First-Class construction university. The university has strong engineering strength, and its medical disciplines have developed rapidly relying on the comprehensive university platform. Clinical medicine and other majors have a high reputation in Jiangsu Province, and their appeal to high-scoring candidates continues to increase.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with long-term training programs such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) particularly favored by candidates. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, the capital of Jiangsu Province, with a superior geographical location, which strongly attracts candidates within the province. The significant reduction in medical enrollment in 2026 will further intensify competition, and the admission ranking is expected to increase significantly compared to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the above factors, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Southeast University's medical category in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is approximately 5780th, with a fluctuation range of 5605-5955. This is a significant increase (harder to enter) compared to 6362nd in 2025, mainly due to the dual impact of the substantial reduction in enrollment plans and the continued high popularity of medical majors.

- Clinical Medicine Category (Clinical Medicine, Medical Imaging)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
